title: Equiplus Company Limited worked under our supervision on contract we offered to them for contract No. AE-102/2021-2022/DOM/O4. Their responsibilities included supply and installation of solar pumping
description: Equiplus Company Limited worked under our supervision on contract we offered to them for contract No. AE-102/2021-2022/DOM/O4. Their responsibilities included supply and installation of solar pumping system which was tested and commissioned on time as per contract scope. We hence recommend Equiplus for similar works and services on solar pumping system.
